titleStmt.title: SII 8.438: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 438. (A.R. No. 150 of 1903). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME STEPS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīparākra mapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10vatu mituṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pratha maiyum
putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭātināḷ nāṭṭu nāṭum nakaramum grā maṅkaḷom kāraiyūrkiḻavaṉ tevaṉāṉa kāraiyūr Ai[yāraṟku kāṇivilaipra māṇam paṇ
ṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāṭṭu kūṭalūrāṉa Aññūṟṟuvamaṅkalattu sabhai- yār Eṅkaḷukku 9- vatu kaṭamaiiṟukka Āṟṟāteṉṟuñ colla Ivvūrai
Uṅkaḷukku veṇṭiṉa Iṭatte viṟṟukkoḷḷuṅko ḷeṉṟu collukaiyil Ivvūṟ pakutikku Uṭaiyār māḷavacakkra vattikaḷ kāriyattukkukkaṭavār niṅkaḷ
taraveṇu meṉṟu maṟikkaiyā latuk koru pokkillātapaṭiyāle Ivar Iṟaiyilum kāvaluṅ kaḻittu tevatāṉamākat tiruccūlasthā pana m paṇṇi
ttarak koḷviruḷaro veṉ ṟorukālāvatu mirukālāvatu mukkālāvatu muṟkūṟa piṟkūṟi Ikkāraiyūrveḷaār koḷve ṉeṉkaiyi livaṟku nāṅka
ḷ viṟpataṟ kicaintu viṟkiṉṟa Intak kūṭalūrāṉa Aiññūṟṟuvamaṅkalattu sabh Aiyār kāṇiyāṉa Oṉṟupātiyu mivarkaḷpakkal muṉṉāḷ Ik
kāraiyūrveḷār koṇṭa Oṉṟupātiyu mivarkku ṅkalat tevatāṉa
lūrāṉa Itta Aiññūṟṟumaṅkalattup perunāṉkellaiyāvaṉa kiḻpāṟkellai veḷḷāṟṟukkum kiḻakkum Ellaikku meṟkum teṉ
pāṟkellai kuḻikkum Ellaikkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai [catimā vellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai veḷḷāṟṟukkut teṟkumāka I
cainta perunāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparippum kāluṅ kālā� yum vayalum vayaṟpāccum nattamum nattappāṭum puṉcaikaḷum meṉokkiṉa maraṅ
kaḷuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa sa matta prā ttikaḷum(p) paḷḷiccantam paḻantevatānam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam ṉikki Iṟaiyili
� viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkuṅ kuḷikai �100 5 10 Intapaṇam nūṟṟaimpatukkum vilaikkuṟa vi
ṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇakkaḷatte kāṭṭeṟṟi kaipporu ḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipra- māṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom . Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭukka kūṭalūrāṉa Aiñ
ñūṟṟuvamaṅkalattil nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa samastaprā ttiyilum paḷḷiccantam paḻantevatānan tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam ṉikki Iṟaiyili
luñ cuvantiraṅkaḷu muṭpaṭa Inta kāraiyūrveḷār Uṭaiyār tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku vaitta Oru tirununtāviḷakku
ṇṭu Oṉṟukku Iṟukkum Irāci �4 10 Ippaṇam nāṟpatukkum tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Iṟaiyilum puraviluṅ kaḻittukkuṭuttom Ippaṭi vi
ṟṟa Ivvūṟku pañcupili cantuvikkiṟamam Āṭtevai veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ nāṭṭuviṉivokam kāttikaippoṉ maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa viṉi
vokaṅkaḷum kaḻittukkuṭuttu kuṭiniṅkā tevatāṉamāka nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlasthā paṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttom . Ippaṭikku
cantirātittavar celvatāka Uṭaiyār tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tirumalaiyile kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi
kkoḷḷakkaṭavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu kuṭuttom kāraiyūr
raṟkku teṉkonāṭṭu nāṭu kaḷom . Ivai veḷāṉ ṭaiyāṉ EḻuttuAfter this, there are two more lines containing the names of signatories, which are completely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 8.438 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
